verdicts.one_line: Shared object = replicator/eco-evolutionary dynamics with frequency-dependent payoff matrices coupled to a dynamical resource variable (game-environment feedback); the Hofbauer-Sigmund replicator<->Lotka-Volterra equivalence makes the role-for-role mapping genuine, though A is a finite-population stochastic mutation-selection process and B a deterministic ODE analysed for equilibria/bifurcations.

Claimed engine is the Jaynes maximum-entropy principle, but A is a physical wave/oscillator thermalization reaching a Rayleigh-Jeans equilibrium while B is epistemic entropic inference deriving a Merton jump-diffusion SDE - no shared governing equation, only the generic 'maximize entropy under constraints' meta-principle, and A never actually frames itself as inference.

Shared object = simplicial homology / Betti numbers of a simplicial complex built from discrete observations; both genuinely do this (observer-worldline complex from vN-algebra projections vs Vietoris-Rips filtration + combinatorial Laplacians), a non-obvious pairing, though A's construction is speculative/nascent and B is a full standard persistent-homology pipeline, so the depth is asymmetric.

Shared governing equation = the parabolic Fokker-Planck/heat diffusion PDE for a probability density evolving in a time-like parameter; genuine - Persson's contact theory famously maps the pressure-distribution evolution in magnification to a diffusion equation, and option pricing reduces to Fokker-Planck (Black-Scholes = heat equation), with B adding a jump/Kolmogorov-Feller integral term A lacks.

Shared object = the linearized Boltzmann transport equation (Liouville streaming operator + collision integral) solved for out-of-equilibrium delta-f to extract a transport/dissipation coefficient; genuinely the same equation for 2D electron kinetics and bubble-wall plasma friction, but this is textbook-universal kinetic theory rather than a surprising link.

Shared structure = a log-Gaussian Cox process (point pattern whose intensity is modulated by a latent Gaussian random field) with a scalar coupling - galaxy bias b <-> LGCP loading - linking a second co-located observable (CMB-lensing convergence <-> store survival) to the same latent field via cross-correlation; a precise, non-obvious structural isomorphism (the lognormal biased-tracer field is literally an LGCP).

summary.overall: Yes - on a fresh external arXiv corpus with near-zero lexical overlap the pipeline surfaced 5 of 6 genuine same-equation cross-field bridges, so it is finding real structural analogies rather than keyword collisions. The most compelling and non-obvious is E5 (galaxy-bias/CMB-lensing clustering <-> Bayesian Tokyo retail-survival, both one log-Gaussian Cox process with a shared latent field and a bias<->loading coupling inferred by cross-correlation), followed by E3 (Persson rough-surface contact theory <-> option pricing, both reducing to a Fokker-Planck/heat diffusion PDE). E0 and E4 are real but textbook/specialist (replicator<->Lotka-Volterra eco-evolutionary dynamics; the universal linearized Boltzmann kinetic equation), and only E1 fails, over-abstracting to the generic maximum-entropy/Jaynes meta-principle instead of a shared governing equation.
